info.title: Livestock Keeper Data API (Public)
info.description:
The Livestock Keeper Data API is a reference data service that allows developers to build applications that connect with Defra's Livestock - Location and Party Data domain.

With the Livestock Keeper Data API, you can:

* **Authenticate** with Defra's identity system using Bearer (JWT) or Basic authentication.
* **Retrieve** location-based reference data such as Sites and its related data such as Parties, Species, Marks etc.
* **Retrieve** reference data for Parties and related information.
* **Trigger** data import scans (internal, feature-gated).
* **Manage** dead letter queue messages (internal, feature-gated).

All list endpoints support **Change Data Capture (CDC)** via the `lastUpdatedDate` query parameter, returning only records updated since the provided timestamp.

All list endpoints return paginated results with `count`, `totalCount`, `values`, `page`, `pageSize`, `totalPages`, `hasNextPage`, and `hasPreviousPage` fields.

get.description: The endpoint allows searching and retrieving a list of parties. Supports filtering by name, email, and Change Data Capture (CDC) via the lastUpdatedDate parameter.

parameters.name: FirstName
parameters.description: Filter parties by first name.

parameters.name: LastName
parameters.description: Filter parties by last name.

parameters.name: Email
parameters.description: Filter parties by email address.

parameters.name: LastUpdatedDate
parameters.description: Returns only records that have been updated since the provided timestamp (greater than or equal to). This is the key parameter for Change Data Capture (CDC).

parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: Page number (1-based). Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Number of records per page. Defaults to 10.

parameters.name: Order
parameters.description: The field to order the results by. Available fields for sorting: id (sorts by id), name. Defaults to name.

parameters.name: Sort
parameters.description: The sort direction. Available values: asc, desc. Defaults to asc.

parameters.name: Cursor
parameters.description: The cursor for the next page of results. Leave blank for the first page.

400.description: The request was malformed or could not be processed.

401.description: Access token is not set or invalid.

403.description: The requestor is not authorized to perform this operation on the resource.

500.description: The server encountered an unexpected error

get.description: The endpoint allows to retrieve details of a given party, including their communication details, correspondence address, and roles.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier (UUID) of the party.

401.description: Access token is not set or invalid.

403.description: The requestor is not authorized to perform this operation on the resource.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

500.description: The server encountered an unexpected error

get.summary: Retrieve a list of available sites
get.description: Endpoint created to retrieve a list of sites. Parameters can be set to filter by various elements such as Site Identifiers, Site Type, Site Id, Party Id etc. Supports Change Data Capture (CDC) via the lastUpdatedDate parameter.

parameters.name: SiteIdentifier
parameters.description: Filter by a single site identifier such as CPH Number, FSA No, Port No etc.

parameters.name: SiteIdentifiers
parameters.description: Filter by multiple site identifiers (comma-separated). A maximum number of values applies.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description:
Filter by site type code (comma-separated). Possible site type codes include:
AC (Assembly Centre), AH (Agricultural Holding), AP (Airport), CA (Calf Collection Centre),
CC (Collection Centre), CL (Common Land), HA (Haulier), HK (Hunt Kennel),
KY (Knacker's Yard), LA (Lairage), LR (Laboratory/Research), MA (Market),
QU (Quarantine), SG (Showground), SM (S/H Both MP and Cs), SP (Seaport),
SR (Slaughter House Red Meat), ST (Staging Post), SW (Slaughter House White Meat),
VE (Veterinary Practice), VI (Veterinary Investigation Centre), WP (Wildlife Park), ZO (Zoo).

parameters.name: SiteId
parameters.description: Filter by a single site ID (UUID).

parameters.name: SiteIds
parameters.description: Filter by multiple site IDs (comma-separated UUIDs). A maximum number of values applies.

parameters.name: KeeperPartyId
parameters.description: Filter sites by a keeper party ID (UUID).

parameters.name: LastUpdatedDate
parameters.description: Returns only records that have been updated since the provided timestamp (greater than or equal to). This is the key parameter for Change Data Capture (CDC).

parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: Page number (1-based). Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Number of records per page. Defaults to 10.

parameters.name: Order
parameters.description: The field to order the results by. Available fields for sorting: name, type, siteidentifier. Defaults to name.

parameters.name: Sort
parameters.description: The sort direction. Available values: asc, desc. Defaults to asc.

parameters.name: Cursor
parameters.description: The cursor for the next page of results. Leave blank for the first page.

400.description: The request was malformed or could not be processed.

401.description: Access token is not set or invalid.

403.description: The requestor is not authorized to perform this operation on the resource.

500.description: The server encountered an unexpected error

get.description: The endpoint returns an object containing the requested site's full detailed information, including location, identifiers, parties, species, marks, and activities.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier (UUID) of the site.

401.description: Access token is not set or invalid.

403.description: The requestor is not authorized to perform this operation on the resource.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

500.description: The server encountered an unexpected error

get.summary: Retrieve a list of ISO Countries
get.description: Endpoint created to retrieve a list of ISO Countries. Parameters can be set to filter by name, code, EU trade membership, and devolved authority status. Supports Change Data Capture (CDC) via the lastUpdatedDate parameter.

parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: Page number (1-based). Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: PageSize
parameters.description: Number of records per page. Defaults to 10.

parameters.name: Order
parameters.description: The field to order the results by. Available fields for sorting: name, code. Defaults to code.

parameters.name: Sort
parameters.description: The sort direction. Available values: asc, desc. Defaults to asc.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: Filter countries by name.

parameters.name: Code
parameters.description: Filter countries by code. Accepts a comma-separated list of country codes.

parameters.name: EuTradeMember
parameters.description: Filter by EU trade membership flag.

parameters.name: DevolvedAuthority
parameters.description: Filter by devolved authority flag.

parameters.name: LastUpdatedDate
parameters.description: Returns only records that have been updated since the provided timestamp (greater than or equal to). This is the key parameter for Change Data Capture (CDC).

400.description: The request was malformed or could not be processed.

401.description: Access token is not set or invalid.

403.description: The requestor is not authorized to perform this operation on the resource.

500.description: The server encountered an unexpected error

get.description: The endpoint returns an object containing the requested country detailed information.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier (UUID) of the country.

401.description: Access token is not set or invalid.

403.description: The requestor is not authorized to perform this operation on the resource.

404.description: The requested resource was not found.

500.description: The server encountered an unexpected error

id.description: This is an immutable field which represents the golden key of the master data object.

addressLine1.description: This single address line is associated with the OS Address Base Fields such as SAO_TEXT, SAO_START_NUMBER, PAO_TEXT, PAO_START_NUMBER and STREET_DESCRIPTION.

addressLine2.description: This optional field is associated with the OS Address Base Field of LOCALITY, if applicable.

postTown.description: This field describes the Town or City of the Address. It is aligned to the OS Address Base Field of POST_TOWN.

county.description: This optional field is associated with the OS Address Base Field of ADMINISTRATIVE_AREA.

lastUpdatedDate.description: The timestamp of the last time the Address record was updated.

id.description: This is an immutable field which represents the golden key of the master data object.

primaryContactFlag.description: Indicates whether this is the primary contact.

lastUpdatedDate.description: The timestamp of the last time the Communication record was updated.

id.description: This is an immutable field which represents the golden key of the reference object.

code.description: This the business code/key of the Country object. This is a mutable field, where this field data could possibly change.

name.description: This the business name of the Country object. This is a mutable field, where this field data could possibly change.

longName.description: The long name of the country.

euTradeMemberFlag.description: Indicates whether the country is an EU trade member.

devolvedAuthorityFlag.description: Indicates whether the country is a devolved authority.

lastUpdatedDate.description: The timestamp of the last time the Country record was updated.

count.description: Number of items on the current page.

totalCount.description: Total number of items across all pages.

values.description: The items on the current page.

pageSize.description: The number of items per page.

hasNextPage.description: Whether there is a next page available.

hasPreviousPage.description: Whether there is a previous page available.

CountryDTOPaginatedResult.description: A paginated result containing a subset of items and pagination metadata.

id.description: This is an immutable field which represents the golden key of the reference object.

longName.description: The long name of the country.

euTradeMemberFlag.description: Indicates whether the country is an EU trade member.

devolvedAuthorityFlag.description: Indicates whether the country is a devolved authority.

lastModifiedDate.description: The timestamp of the last time the Country record was updated.

CountrySummaryDocument.description: A lightweight country summary embedded within address records.

id.description: This is an immutable field which represents the golden key of the master data object.

startDate.description: The date the herd/flock/group mark was assigned.

endDate.description: The date the herd/flock/group mark was removed.

species.description: The species associated with this mark.
